personas.details:
Physically/mentally healthy enough for aging or care at home.
60+ years old, 1 or more chronic conditions
Can benefit from the use of an intervention tool like Vlx
At risk for social isolation
living alone or with a spouse in a home environment 
One or more paid professionals are involved in the individual's care
Some prior experience and comfort level with the use of technology
Limited need for physical assistance
personas.label: Care recipient

personas.details: Adult child/spouse who has responsibility for aging parent and may still have children at home
personas.label: Family caregiver

personas.details: A licensed or unlicensed professional who also has good technology, caregiving, and communications skills, and manages multiple care recipients
personas.label: Care Coordinator

personas.details: A licensed professional who gets paid to provide care for one or more care recipients and travels to the individual homes to provide care
personas.label: Professional caregiver
Self-Directed Care Recipient
personas.details: An individual aging senior that is responsible for directing their own care

personas.label: Agency or Association
personas.details: Responsible for structuring the care program and delivering value-based outcomes to a group of care recipients

personas.label: Segment Customer
personas.details:
An entity that offers the VLx App as a covered component of their offerings.

Disability Providers
Home Health Agencies
Elder care Law Firms
Strategic Partners
Senior Housing
Care Brokers
Care Coordination Orgs
PACE, LHCSA, CHHA
Government Entities - NYSOFA
Health Care Provider
Health Insurance (Payer)
Wealth Management Firms
Individual
Life Care Planning Law Firm
Employer Group

default.successCriteria:
Clients convert after trial 80%
Deliver trial value outcomes required by the agency
An in the market product that we can justify hiring a salesperson

00AIPcBs7sfznjK6ERmJ.name: In-App Feedback & NPS System
00AIPcBs7sfznjK6ERmJ.note:
The ability to gather User data while using the App to get feedback on features and how it is, or not meeting user needs.

What is the process of incorporating the NPS protocols into the deployment of the App

11g9Vp7UsuNlk4H0cQkx.name: Administrative Web Console
11g9Vp7UsuNlk4H0cQkx.note: Need to provide access for additional roles. Currently structured for high-level administration and the Life Care Coordinator level.

1cFnY80tucuQhGsgI1In.name: Behavioral Nudge Engine
1cFnY80tucuQhGsgI1In.note: This is Wellness guidance driven, which is based on AI algorithms that identify areas of concern for individuals and "nudges" them toward better behavior.

6pEuBXBIlWt63F8Uk6wq.name: Family Caregiver App
6pEuBXBIlWt63F8Uk6wq.note: This is the primary set of features and functionality that runs on top of the VLx platform infrastructure.

7L6SD7RVr7nJg0PodGDb.name: eCommerce - In-App Subscriptions
7L6SD7RVr7nJg0PodGDb.note: 1. eCommerce Integration; 2. In-app purchases (aka In-app subs); 3. Platform setup, Admin processes (e.g., subs price lists, etc.). Platform setup, administration of the related features.

7aDdfFuOXoPCGdZuHprG.name: 911 & Emergency Services Integration
7aDdfFuOXoPCGdZuHprG.note: Calling out to 911 during an emergency from within the VLx App

9155wo4S9Qtsa7Kuthhs.name: Caregiver Activity Logs (EVV)
9155wo4S9Qtsa7Kuthhs.note: Required for verifying caregiver visit, and used for payment purposes. Medicare and Medicaid requirements.

9olVIUCrRzNaIVZB1ENp.name: Health Risk Identification
9olVIUCrRzNaIVZB1ENp.note: Part of MIA, and driven by data collection systems to enable the risk identification algorithms

AFEPyZyCN3rzK5xhggLC.name: To-Do List & Care Tasks
AFEPyZyCN3rzK5xhggLC.note: Specified updates and enhancements based on the next set of requirements in a phased development path. Need to determine what is most important at this stage from a calendaring perspective, and what other parts of the app need to be connected to this feature.

BgHBlm3DSIPR0F3K6T2e.name: Content Sharing (Photos/Docs/Videos)
BgHBlm3DSIPR0F3K6T2e.note:
Existing bare MVP functionality to share PDFs by uploading in Web Admin. Final size depends on final requirements.

Anyone in the family caregiving circle has permission to upload and download documents.

Cu2Ol0E7Fn83Wj4fRS84.name: Proprietary Wellness Score
Cu2Ol0E7Fn83Wj4fRS84.note: This will touch everything and encompass a significant number of key areas across features as it will derive the data that drives the AI-enabled intelligence and algorithms that will define the proprietary scoring model.

DlrMNnXmbX0guT1PPekD.name: A/B Testing Infrastructure
DlrMNnXmbX0guT1PPekD.note: Systematic approach to testing the various features, needs to apply resources to an effort like this.

Gz23kRo3biAi2pJHPFrd.name: Caregiver Support Resources
Gz23kRo3biAi2pJHPFrd.note: Trualta, etc. (service integration, sso?, without any functionality in-app)

M82orP9wHCB9dMkziJFQ.name: Voice AI Assistant
M82orP9wHCB9dMkziJFQ.note: The ability to use Voice Interactive commands and the use of the App.

QAq27ihBcpGx5ZQRaE65.name: Health Education Content Library
QAq27ihBcpGx5ZQRaE65.note: Access to Trualta and other online resources

QTtcBkCd0tpUcbiUmmYJ.name: Agentic AI Core (Mia Health)
QTtcBkCd0tpUcbiUmmYJ.note: A lot of this is driven by the extent to which MIA Health has matured in terms of capabilities. This may be a large undertaking, currently indeterminate.

QYlm4MyWLzgsTDa6Ke45.name: Care Team Messaging
QYlm4MyWLzgsTDa6Ke45.note: In-app circle members; Part of larger alerting/messaging system

RTGQfCba7JOH0fs4NAnn.name: ER Avoidance & Acute Event Capture
RTGQfCba7JOH0fs4NAnn.note:
Required as part of the NYS App requirements. 

Part of the alert/messaging system.  Pending a better definition of requirements, it's likely we have very little place to support this right now, and it will require more in-depth scoping to determine the level of effort required to support this feature.

RfBFl1OCUQqpFKejnIzp.name: EHR / Provider Integration
RfBFl1OCUQqpFKejnIzp.note: Where will this come into play, likely driven by the need for a group or healthcare provider, not in the immediate future? The relationship with the provider will drive requirements, specifications, and timeline.

T0x88hekYZeYYSAOlQL2.name: Stress Detection
T0x88hekYZeYYSAOlQL2.note: Integration of MIA, Device, Caregiver observations, etc.

V6O5YXdivW3BRNMLt7Hl.name: AI Biometric Analytics
V6O5YXdivW3BRNMLt7Hl.note: MIA - 1) service integration; 2) functional implementation per our spec. The ability to use this data to drive the biometric analytics

VS5cl5zpBNgC5UvVj6P7.name: Connected Device Vitals
VS5cl5zpBNgC5UvVj6P7.note: Since it's the first device integration, this effectively means developing an entirely new service/feature on the platform.  Lots of testing and learning for initial device discovery/setup. These would be vitals or biometric readings that are not derived from MIA or the device or process used for facial scanning.

VoiIGcpjbeTWvLPBqUXu.name: Onboarding & Setup Flow
VoiIGcpjbeTWvLPBqUXu.note: Onboarding must be easy, accessible, streamlined, and reduce friction across the onboarding process.

WhHFGJfdH6EAxEDDHaF5.name: Senior Social Connection
WhHFGJfdH6EAxEDDHaF5.note: Need additional definition for this feature.

Wz1HJjTpvy0qc6TR3Dr7.name: Population Health Dashboard
Wz1HJjTpvy0qc6TR3Dr7.note: The ability to track user metrics across user populations.

XaBFhXuUfuHkfoOKZFJL.name: Multi-Device App Platform
XaBFhXuUfuHkfoOKZFJL.note:
Mostly an issue for UI/UX team, tech implementation should be straightforward;  RELATED OR SAME ISSUE AS "SENIOR MODE".
Proper responsive design for the various viewport sizes of the individual device types and device families. WCAG/ADA should be a consideration and a complete UX/UI refresh.

Xkd1f2XX7Z4PWIVsa2pW.note: Need a detailed definition of Medication Reminders

YYMVwGdiSpbY0Vnc6HBG.note: Need a detailed definition of Medication Tracking & Sharing

f9bYJB034WF9MfKoH1XU.note: The ability to capture data related to App uptime, system alerting, and performance reporting. Expand to include operation data

g1LJlF3KnJ4vgDB2ALNV.name: Role-Based Access Control + Audit Trail
g1LJlF3KnJ4vgDB2ALNV.note: Significant work has been done to specify RBAC and related security issues and areas of potential vulnerability. This should be under a feature area called "Security"

gK1qrOfcG0BfGbGc4vZB.name: Daily Routine & ADL Tracking
gK1qrOfcG0BfGbGc4vZB.note: We have components of this functionality, including tasks and reminders. We need to break the connections related to GrandCare dependencies

gXbhXMQuKEWW3ZgAmv2A.name: Senior Activity & Learning (GetSetUp)
gXbhXMQuKEWW3ZgAmv2A.note: This may be just simple links embedded in the UI? Needs further definition.

jMNw3BAVirItjvu8Afb6.name: HIPAA Compliance Certification
jMNw3BAVirItjvu8Afb6.note: Engaging in a full sweep of the App and platform to address any areas where privacy is a concern, where restricted information may be exposed, including any updates or enhancements that support this effort.

jVix9CJzNDnLRRHlUuqN.name: Environmental Sensors Integration
jVix9CJzNDnLRRHlUuqN.note: These are sensor-type devices that will detect things like carbon monoxide and other environmental concerns

lSoCobjFTlUivkdpvyQd.name: Clinical Trial Cohort Management
lSoCobjFTlUivkdpvyQd.note: Part of a larger program and related data collection, analytics process

mlZnctEYslBE4oJRUTk2.name: Shared Calendar
mlZnctEYslBE4oJRUTk2.note: Specified updates and enhancements based on the next set of requirements in a phased development path. Need to determine what is most important at this stage from a calendaring perspective, and what other parts of the app need to be connected to this feature.

ndLJ54LjJOT7LMoJtZM9.name: NYSOFA Standards & Requirements
ndLJ54LjJOT7LMoJtZM9.note: The NYS requirements and standards related to the delivery of applications, related infrastructure, use of AI, and other features and programmatic areas.

o4Dk3uAOzxQK0guKgzvz.name: Emergency Telemedicine Access
o4Dk3uAOzxQK0guKgzvz.note: Connection to UCM-successor telemedicine app. Will need additional refinement, updates, or enhancements based on emerging specifications toward full definition.

pfJyKQMypKRVwX4VMXXU.name: Offline Mode & Low-Bandwidth Support
pfJyKQMypKRVwX4VMXXU.note:
Connectivity status indicators should be established and ensure correctly defined and implemented. Offline-first logic will require analysis, work that must be estimated; we already indicate online status, though the UI needs to be clearer. Need to have a plan and schema/approach around defining offline capabilities. 

Make sure to keep track of this feature and schedule it to be considered during the scoping of the MVP. It will be initiated as one of the first new features after MVP, and may be accelerated if a pilot or other programs require this functionality

tWTlRTAo6LLC204phZAd.name: Notification & Alert Management
tWTlRTAo6LLC204phZAd.note: There is a lot of API-driven functionality to update that will support receiving data and signals from 3rd-party services like the MIA Health facial scanning or related tools and services.

y77RPzziDYmYzYxTcgmm.name: Fall Detection
y77RPzziDYmYzYxTcgmm.note:
Discovery for finding methods to determine when a user has a fall. Could be the integration of other devices and systems, like Cherish. Could be through acoustics like Sense.ai, camera-based technology, or wearables that provide fall detection capabilities.

Related to ER Avoidance & Acute Event Capture.

Also, look to what makes sense in terms of "Fall Prevention"

yg6w121YHvnexbqrFZc2.name: Role-Based Vitals Reporting
yg6w121YHvnexbqrFZc2.note: This functionality refers to user roles and the permissions associated with what a user with specific access can see or do as it relates to vitals reporting.

yszI6yGA4zXPA5WoqvDa.name: Privacy-Forward Video (Consent-Only)
yszI6yGA4zXPA5WoqvDa.note: Hooks to be incorporated into the site, and upgrades and enhancements to support this and related features
